---
title: "In-Class Exercises"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# In-Class Exercise

This section contains the in-class exercises completed for the module.

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.info-card}
### Exercise 1

[View Exercise 1](in-class/exercise1.html)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Exercise 2

[View Exercise 2](in-class/exercise2.html)
:::
:::
